raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I had purchased an excursion package from XXXX XXXX XXXX for XX/XX/year>, in the amount of {$210.00}, that day. However, the water excursion in XXXX was cancelled due to weather restriction. I had requested for a refund, but Barclays has not refunded me for the cancelled excursion. I also inquired about a charge of {$84.00} from the merchant ( XXXX XXXX ) on the same day XX/XX/year> I had not received any proof of purchase regarding this transaction nor signature to verify the item.
